title: Playwright vs pw-core
heading: Playwright vs pw-core
description: Observe the gradual difference in code design and usage specs between the two approaches.

table.traditional: High. Explicit page construction and locator declarations.
table.pwcore: Low. Auto-constructed fields and automatic fixture page objects.

table.traditional: Fail at runtime (e.g. typing error in selector string name).
table.pwcore: Type safety ensures compile-time errors during typing.

table.traditional: Complex tests filled with verbose `.locator().fill()` calls.
